notes: Ghana are severely depleted: Mohammed Kudus (quadriceps, tournament-ending), Mohammed Salisu (ACL, tournament-ending), and Thomas Partey (denied entry to Canada) all miss the opener, with Elisha Owusu expected to deputise in midfield. Panama are near full-strength but key creative midfielder Adalberto Carrasquilla missed both warm-up matches with a muscle injury and has been confirmed as starting on the bench by coach Christiansen.
home_scorers: Jordan Ayew (leading scorer in qualifying, captain, box threat)
Antoine Semenyo (in-form attacker, primary goal threat with Kudus absent)
Inaki Williams (pace and physicality up front, set-piece presence)
away_scorers: Ismael Diaz (starting forward, key attacking outlet in predicted XI)
Jose Fajardo (starting striker, dangerous in transition)
Yoel Barcenas (wide attacker, direct runner, goal threat)
